response.justification: Candidate has extensive software development experience (8+ years) and broad full-stack background, but the resume shows no people management or team leadership experience, no developer tools/build systems/test automation role at scale, and no mobile-platform ecosystem work. The role explicitly requires 2+ years people management and 3+ years building developer tools — neither is evidenced. Workshops and open-source tooling are positives but do not substitute for the management track record.
strengths: Long tenure with broad full-stack and polyglot engineering experience
Has built developer-adjacent tooling (test runner Trial, Fluent-Asserts, MCP code generators, CI/CD setups)
Active in knowledge sharing via workshops, talks, and training courses
concerns: No demonstrated people management or direct-report leadership experience
No mobile-platform ecosystem experience (iOS/Android scale tooling)
Title is IC 'Senior/Staff Software Engineer' — no roadmap ownership or org-change leadership shown
